Natanz struck 2nd time (Mar 21). 400kg HEU remains per Iran. Trump ultimatum ~8hrs. Parliament Speaker: 'new phase.' BBC Verify confirms interceptor failure on 2 ballistic missiles. iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 22 Hour 10 UTC. 100% (capped, IMMINENT). Trump 48hr ultimatum ACTIVE - ~8hrs remaining (~00:53 CET Mar 24). BBC live: 180+ casualties confirmed Dimona/Arad. Iran internet blackout enters DAY 23 (longest in history). No diplomatic off-ramps. Al Jazeera: Day 23 of US-Israel war on Iran. BBC: 'Trump at a crossroads' - rhetoric not matching ground reality. Updated 2026-03-22T10:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Iranian missiles injure 160 in Arad and Dimona — interceptors failed
latest_news.text: 84 injured in Arad, 78 in Dimona from Iranian ballistic missiles that penetrated Israeli air defenses. 10-year-old boy seriously hurt in Dimona. Interceptors launched but failed to hit threats. State of emergency declared in Arad.

latest_news.headline: Marine Expeditionary Unit deploying to Middle East — 2,500 combat troops
latest_news.text: MEU departed Japan, another from California — both heading to Middle East. Analysts suggest Kharg Island seizure as potential objective. Trump: 'If I were sending ground troops, I wouldn't tell you.'

latest_news.headline: Iran warns: attack Kharg Island and we'll set fire to energy facilities regionwide
latest_news.text: Iran state media warns any attack on Kharg Island (90% of Iran oil exports) would cause 'insecurity in the Red Sea' and 'set fire to energy facilities throughout the region' — major escalation threat.

latest_news.headline: NCTC Director Joe Kent resigns over opposition to Iran war
latest_news.text: US National Counterterrorism Center director Joe Kent resigns, speaking out against Iran war at prayer event. Says he opposed the conflict — internal US dissent signal.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

Hezbollah full barrages ongoing. 1,024+ killed, 1M+ displaced. No major new escalation but sustained high-intensity operations. Updated 2026-03-22T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: US-backed Ukraine-Russia talks continue, more sessions Sunday
latest_news.text: Ukraine and Russia trade strikes as US-brokered talks in Florida continue. Deaths reported on both sides. More negotiating sessions scheduled for Sunday.

latest_news.headline: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Ukraine/US talks continue. Pakistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~16hrs. 160+ wounded Dimona/Arad. MEU deploying. Iran threatens Red Sea + energy fires. NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION intensifying toward ultimatum deadline.

latest_news.headline: Dimona/Arad casualties raised to 180+ — BBC confirms
latest_news.text: Updated casualty count: 180+ wounded in Iranian ballistic missile strikes on Dimona and Arad. BBC confirms 84 Arad, 78 Dimona, with additional casualties reported. Interceptors failed on 2 ballistic missiles near nuclear site.

latest_news.headline: Houthis: 'All options on the table' — considering naval blockade
latest_news.text: Senior Houthi politburo member Mohammed al-Bukhaiti declares 'All options at the military level are possible.' Group considering naval blockade targeting vessels of aggressor countries in Red Sea/Bab-el-Mandeb to support Iran.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens regional water/desalination sites if power plants hit
latest_news.text: Iran warns: if US strikes power plants per Trump ultimatum, will target regional water infrastructure and desalination facilities across Gulf states — humanitarian escalation threat.

latest_news.headline: US-brokered Ukraine-Russia talks continue, more sessions Sunday
latest_news.text: Ukraine and Russia trade strikes as US-brokered talks in Florida continue. Deaths on both sides. More negotiating sessions scheduled for Sunday.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 10:00 UTC). CRITICAL: Trump 48hr ultimatum ~8hrs to deadline (~00:53 CET Mar 24). 180+ wounded Dimona/Arad confirmed. Iran internet blackout day 23. BBC: Trump 'at crossroads' - rhetoric not matching reality. No diplomatic off-ramps. Power plant strikes likely within 8hrs if ultimatum expires.
de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 10 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Ukraine/US talks continue in Florida, more sessions Sunday. Pakistan Eid ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~8hrs remaining. 180+ wounded Dimona/Arad confirmed. Iran internet blackout day 23. NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION intensifying toward ultimatum deadline.
